programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: Eyewitness footage captures the moment a tornado tears through the town of Moore, Oklahoma, destroying two schools with the pupils still inside.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Faced with the threat of a shut down in the swamp, the team focuses their energy on the Money Pit and are euphoric when they find more gold, with evidence suggesting it's of Spanish origin.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A couple who’ve kept native tussock on their Southland farm believe making a profit and protecting the environment go naturally together.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A family enjoy the surf and natural beauty of a Northland farm and coastal park.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: It's 4.30am and as Britain's network of roads and motorway stir the team as Lantern gear up for a huge emergency call out; an 18-wheel trailer carrying two portacabins has caught fire.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In the heart of beer country, the Wolfe brothers find the mother lode of breweriana, the granddaddy of all pinball machines, and Elvis inside a Milwaukee collector's suburban home.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.sub-title: Do You Hear What I Hear?
programme.desc: Jessica threatens to cut the neighbourhood carolling this year due to last year's bad performance; Marvin becomes suspicious of Honey when she goes to a movie without him.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns gets into the plant-based burger business, Lisa refuses to believe he's up to no good.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Panic On The Streets Of Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa gets an imaginary friend who makes her feel much better about her friends; Homer gets a vehicle with awesome torque.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The Griffin's are selected to have their TV viewing habits monitored, but Peter takes his role too far when he schemes to take over the airwaves.

programme.title: New: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: War erupts between two neighbours in a Washington, D.C. parking lot, involving traffic cones and handwritten notes; a Santa Rosa, California, neighbour wears out his welcome.

programme.title: New: Customer Wars
programme.desc: On a bus in Maryland, a heated argument between two passengers escalates to a dangerous breaking point; in a New York City pet store, a woman is asked to leave after kicking a puppy's kennel.

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: There are stories of advanced technology from the ancient past that seem too impossible to be true; these technologies challenge everything humanity thought about the innovation of ancestors.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: Secrets from the past mean Jethro gets an opportunity, and Cheryl has the chance to dig up gold.

programme.title: Head High
programme.desc: Vince and Mitch hunt for a missing player; Mana struggles with his feelings; Renee is dealt a devastating blow.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny reluctantly allies himself with The Widow to defeat Quinn but her actions put their uneasy alliance to the test.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Season Finale: Sunny faces the toughest challenge of his life as he sets out to rescue his family from Quinn and his loyalists.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns gets into the plant-based burger business, Lisa refuses to believe he's up to no good.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Panic On The Streets Of Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa gets an imaginary friend who makes her feel much better about her friends; Homer gets a vehicle with awesome torque.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Jessica is determined to prepare a Thanksgiving experience that is superior to the holidays hosted by her sister in years past; Eddie and his cousin learn about the Internet.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In the heart of beer country, the Wolfe brothers find the mother lode of breweriana, the granddaddy of all pinball machines, and Elvis inside a Milwaukee collector's suburban home.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: A holiday cruise ship sails into a hurricane terrifying 4000 passengers as their cabins are plunged underwater. A hurricane at sea plunges 4,000 cruise passengers into panic.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Solving the Oak Island mystery feels closer than ever when the team learns they may have been reading Zena Halpern's templar map incorrectly all along.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A rural poet with a sense of humour and a partner to match.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Martin Hansen sells fish from the back of his boat after braving Cook Strait to catch it.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Lantern recovery op Merrie faces a dangerous challenge when a 20-tonne drinks lorry gets grounded on a boggy verge. A few miles east, fellow recovery op Stu is also in a tricky predicament.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a seasoned collector and his grandson open the doors to a pool hall turned catch-all, where Mike uncovers an ultra-rare pinball machine.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Honey's overbearing mother ridicules her idea of attending a parenting class; Louis and Marvin's free cruise quickly turns into a gambling getaway gone south.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa makes a shocking college decision, wounding Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A British secret agent comes to Springfield in search of a Russian spy.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.sub-title: The Old Man And The Big C
programme.desc: When Brian learns that Carter Pewterschmidt's drug company has developed a cure for cancer but is keeping it from the public to maximize profits, he and Stewie attempt to expose them.

programme.title: New: Rookie Truckers
programme.desc: Fresh from the UK, Phil battles flies and 14-hour days on a gruelling haul across the continent while Shelley fights mechanical issues and Melbourne’s city chaos on her first paid job.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Rookie Miner Dennis’ has a bumper day, culminating in a personal-best nugget find, The Mineshaft Hunters quest for gold is cut short when a team member takes a life threatening fall.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: Jethro's plans start to unravel, but who is the real villain? Meanwhile, Pascalle is accused of crimes most terrible.

programme.title: Head High
programme.desc: Renee struggles with her emotions; Tai worries for Imogen; Jesse and Gabrielle make a decision.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny returns to the Badlands, seeking a cure for his son Henry in the midst of a bloody civil war between The Widow and Chau.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie seek help from Lydia. The Widow enlists Nathaniel Moon as her new Regent.

programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa makes a shocking college decision, wounding Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A British secret agent comes to Springfield in search of a Russian spy.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Jessica and Honey's friendship hits a rough patch after an argument about the investment property. Louis's old friend Barry overstays his welcome and Eddie starts a part-time job working for DMX. S2E9.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a seasoned collector and his grandson open the doors to a pool hall turned catch-all, where Mike uncovers an ultra-rare pinball machine.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: Hurricane Patricia lands in Mexico, sending tourists fleeing for their lives. An English summer fair is beset by a tornado, sending a bouncy castle sky high.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team uncovers significant evidence that the stone road in the swamp was built long before the discovery of the original Money Pit.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Three brothers and their families work together in a Taranaki market garden.
